steps.title: Find the compound subject
steps.content: The subject is "the trefoil knot and the figure-eight knot." Two items joined by "and" form a plural compound subject. The phrase "each with a crossing number below five" is only extra description.

steps.title: Use a plural linking verb
steps.content: A, B, and C are singular verb forms, so they do not agree with the compound subject. The sentence needs the plural present-tense linking verb to say both knots are among the simplest possible knots. The answer is D.
